name: Xinya Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinya Electronic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells wires and cables in China and internationally. It offers PVC wires, halogen free wires, power cord cables, teflon wires, automotive wires, flat cables, solar cables, medical cables, industrial cables, robot cables, etc. The company's products are used in the area of household appliances, telecommunication, automotive, medical, OA system, industrial control system, and other new energy industry. Xinya Electronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Yueqing, China.
